description: Ultra-tiny embedding model. Only 46MB, perfect for lightweight RAG on any hardware.
fullDescription:
## MODEL OVERVIEW
All-MiniLM is a tiny, ultra-fast embedding model based on the Sentence Transformers framework. At only 46MB, it can run on virtually any hardware while providing useful semantic embeddings for sentence-level datasets using self-supervised contrastive learning.

## Key Features
- **Ultra-Tiny**: Only 46MB, smallest practical embedding model
- **Blazing Fast**: Near-instant embedding generation
- **Low Resources**: Runs on any CPU, even edge devices
- **Good Quality**: Reasonable embedding quality for its size
- **Battle-Tested**: One of the most widely used embedding models (2.9M+ pulls)

## Specifications
- Parameters: ~22M (L6-v2) / ~33M (L12-v2)
- Max Sequence Length: 512 tokens
- Embedding Dimension: 384
- Disk Size: 46MB (22m) / 67MB (33m)

## Use Cases
- Lightweight RAG pipelines
- Edge device deployment
- Rapid prototyping
- High-throughput embedding
- Resource-constrained environments

**Note:** Requires Ollama 0.1.26 or later. This model can only be used to generate embeddings.
modelReadme:
Embedding models on very large sentence level datasets.

The project aims to train sentence embedding models on very large sentence level datasets using a self-supervised contrastive learning objective. This model can only be used to generate embeddings.

**Note:** This model requires Ollama 0.1.26 or later.

## Usage

### REST API
```
curl http://localhost:11434/api/embeddings -d '{
  "model": "all-minilm",
  "prompt": "The sky is blue because of Rayleigh scattering"
}'
```

### Python
```python
ollama.embeddings(model='all-minilm', prompt='The sky is blue because of Rayleigh scattering')
```

### JavaScript
```javascript
ollama.embeddings({ model: 'all-minilm', prompt: 'The sky is blue because of Rayleigh scattering' })
```
